heading: Wetland areas
label: 1962d–5e Wetland areas
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Water Resources Development Act of 1976, and not as part of the Water Resources Planning Act which comprises this chapter.

children.heading: Authorization of Secretary of the Army to plan and establish wetland areas; criteria for establishment
children.label: a Authorization of Secretary of the Army to plan and establish wetland areas; criteria for establishment

children.text: environmental, economic, and social benefits of the wetland area justifies the increased cost thereof above the cost required for alternative methods of disposing of dredged material for such project; and
the increased cost of such wetland area will not exceed $400,000; and
there is reasonable evidence that the wetland area to be established will not be substantially altered or destroyed by natural or man-made causes.

children.heading: Reports to Congress
children.label: b Reports to Congress
children.text: Whenever the Secretary of the Army, acting through the Chief of Engineers, submits to Congress a report on a water resources development project after , such report shall include, where appropriate, consideration of the establishment of wetland areas.October 22, 1976

children.heading: Cost
children.label: c Cost
children.text: In the computation of benefits and cost of any water resources development project the benefits of establishing of any wetland area shall be deemed to be at least equal to the cost of establishing such area. All costs of establishing a wetland area shall be borne by the United States.
